'''zhokajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eucalyptoid|eucalyptoid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-k-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eucalyptoid|eucalyptoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhokajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhokajithi|zhokajithi]] || [[word:zhokajiji|zhokajiji]] || [[word:zhokajishi|zhokajishi]] || [[word:zhokajiki|zhokajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhokajuthuthu|zhokajuthuthu]] || [[word:zhokajujuju|zhokajujuju]] || [[word:zhokajushushu|zhokajushushu]] || [[word:zhokajukuku|zhokajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhokajuthu|zhokajuthu]] || [[word:zhokajuju|zhokajuju]] || [[word:zhokajushu|zhokajushu]] || [[word:zhokajuku|zhokajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhokajufthuf|zhokajufthuf]] || [[word:zhokajufjuf|zhokajufjuf]] || [[word:zhokajufshuf|zhokajufshuf]] || [[word:zhokajufkuf|zhokajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhokajethe|zhokajethe]] || [[word:zhokajeje|zhokajeje]] || [[word:zhokajeshe|zhokajeshe]] || [[word:zhokajeke|zhokajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhokajothotho|zhokajothotho]] || [[word:zhokajojojo|zhokajojojo]] || [[word:zhokajoshosho|zhokajoshosho]] || [[word:zhokajokoko|zhokajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhokajotho|zhokajotho]] || [[word:zhokajojo|zhokajojo]] || [[word:zhokajosho|zhokajosho]] || [[word:zhokajoko|zhokajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhokajofthof|zhokajofthof]] || [[word:zhokajofjof|zhokajofjof]] || [[word:zhokajofshof|zhokajofshof]] || [[word:zhokajofkof|zhokajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhokajïfthïf|zhokajïfthïf]] || [[word:zhokajïfjïf|zhokajïfjïf]] || [[word:zhokajïfshïf|zhokajïfshïf]] || [[word:zhokajïfkïf|zhokajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhokajïfthïfthïf|zhokajïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:zhokajïfjïfjïf|zhokajïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:zhokajïfshïfshïf|zhokajïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:zhokajïfkïfkïf|zhokajïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhokajïfthïf|zhokajïfthïf]] || [[word:zhokajïfjïf|zhokajïfjïf]] || [[word:zhokajïfshïf|zhokajïfshïf]] || [[word:zhokajïfkïf|zhokajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhokajïfthïf|zhokajïfthïf]] || [[word:zhokajïfjïf|zhokajïfjïf]] || [[word:zhokajïfshïf|zhokajïfshïf]] || [[word:zhokajïfkïf|zhokajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhokajæthæ|zhokajæthæ]] || [[word:zhokajæjæ|zhokajæjæ]] || [[word:zhokajæshæ|zhokajæshæ]] || [[word:zhokajækæ|zhokajækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhokajathatha|zhokajathatha]] || [[word:zhokajajaja|zhokajajaja]] || [[word:zhokajashasha|zhokajashasha]] || [[word:zhokajakaka|zhokajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhokajatha|zhokajatha]] || [[word:zhokajaja|zhokajaja]] || [[word:zhokajasha|zhokajasha]] || [[word:zhokajaka|zhokajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhokajafthaf|zhokajafthaf]] || [[word:zhokajafjaf|zhokajafjaf]] || [[word:zhokajafshaf|zhokajafshaf]] || [[word:zhokajafkaf|zhokajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhokajasha|zhokajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhokajshësha|zhokajshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhokajrosha|zhokajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhokajmusha|zhokajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhokajyasha|zhokajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhokajnkshësha|gozhokajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhokajnkrosha|gozhokajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhokajnkmusha|gozhokajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhokajnkyasha|gozhokajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhokakajasha|zhokakajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhokakajshësha|zhokakajshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhokakajrosha|zhokakajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhokakajmusha|zhokakajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhokakajyasha|zhokakajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhokakajnkshësha|gozhokakajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhokakajnkrosha|gozhokakajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhokakajnkmusha|gozhokakajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhokakajnkyasha|gozhokakajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhekæjasha|zhekæjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhekæjshësha|zhekæjshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhekæjrosha|zhekæjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhekæjmusha|zhekæjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhekæjyasha|zhekæjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhekæjnkshësha|gozhekæjnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhekæjnkrosha|gozhekæjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhekæjnkmusha|gozhekæjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhekæjnkyasha|gozhekæjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhokfajasha|zhokfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhokfajshësha|zhokfajshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhokfajrosha|zhokfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhokfajmusha|zhokfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhokfajyasha|zhokfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhokfajnkshësha|gozhokfajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhokfajnkrosha|gozhokfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhokfajnkmusha|gozhokfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhokfajnkyasha|gozhokfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
